mapper.select: SELECT ai.id, ai.name, ai.introduction, ai.district_id as districtId, ai.city_id as cityId, ai.province_id as provinceId, ai.address_detail as addressDetail, ai.latitude, ai.longitude, ai.phone, ai.landlord_id as landlordId, ai.is_release as isRelease, ai.create_time as createTime, ai.update_time as updateTime, p.name as provinceName, c.name as cityName, d.name as districtName, (SELECT MIN(ri.rent) FROM room_info ri WHERE ri.apartment_id = ai.id AND ri.is_deleted = 0) as minRent FROM apartment_info ai LEFT JOIN province_info p ON ai.province_id = p.id LEFT JOIN city_info c ON ai.city_id = c.id LEFT JOIN district_info d ON ai.district_id = d.id WHERE ai.id = #{id} AND ai.is_deleted = 0

SELECT fv.id, fv.name, fv.unit, fv.fee_key_id as feeKeyId, fv.creator_type as creatorType, fv.creator_id as creatorId, fk.name as feeKeyName FROM apartment_fee_value afv INNER JOIN fee_value fv ON afv.fee_value_id = fv.id INNER JOIN fee_key fk ON fv.fee_key_id = fk.id WHERE afv.apartment_id = #{apartmentId} AND afv.is_deleted = 0 AND fv.is_deleted = 0 AND fk.is_deleted = 0 ORDER BY fk.name ASC, fv.name ASC
SELECT gi.id, gi.name, gi.url FROM graph_info gi WHERE gi.item_type = 1 AND gi.item_id = #{apartmentId} AND gi.is_deleted = 0 ORDER BY gi.create_time ASC
